auth.signInToContinue: Sign in to continue to your dashboard
auth.joinFarmers: Join thousands of farmers using AI-powered insights
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.googleLoginFailed: Google login failed. Please try again.
auth.passwordHint: Use 8+ characters with letters and numbers.
auth.termsAndPrivacy: By signing up you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.
auth.tagline: Diagnose crop diseases, get irrigation schedules, and optimize your harvest — all through a conversational AI built for agriculture.

home.description: Disease detection, irrigation planning, crop health Q&A — all in one place. Purpose-built for farmers and agronomists who need accurate, actionable answers.
home.fromFieldToInsight: From field to insight in 3 steps
home.joinFarmersCta: Join 12,000+ farmers using CropSage to protect their harvests. Free to start, no credit card required.
home.step1Desc: Sign up free in 30 seconds. No credit card needed to start exploring crop intelligence.
home.step2Desc: Type your crop question or drop a leaf photo for instant AI analysis and diagnosis.
home.step3Desc: Apply the advice to your fields and revisit history to track changes across seasons.
home.whyOnlyAgricultureDesc: CropSage is intentionally trained on crops, soil, irrigation, and plant diseases only. This narrow focus keeps every answer accurate, practical, and genuinely useful for your fields.
home.secureDesc: Your farm data stays yours. Encrypted at rest, never shared.
home.instantDesc: Answers in under 3 seconds, even for complex multi-crop disease queries.
home.worksDesc: Supports crops from tropical to temperate climates across 50+ countries.
home.footerTagline: AI-powered agricultural intelligence for modern farmers and agronomists worldwide.
home.copyright: © 2025 CropSage · Built with 💚 for farmers everywhere

weather.title: Weather Advisory
weather.subtitle: Real-time weather insights for your farm
weather.farmLocationSubtitle: Enter your farm location to get weather-based advisories
weather.updateLocationSubtitle: Update your farm location for accurate weather data
weather.farmLocationPlaceholder: e.g., Gunupur, Odisha or Mumbai, India
weather.enterCityHint: Enter a city/town name for best results
weather.tip1: Check weather every morning before field activities
weather.tip2: Plan irrigation based on upcoming rain predictions
weather.tip3: Apply pesticides only when no rain is expected for 24 hours
weather.tip4: Update your farm location for accurate local forecasts

fertilizer.title: Fertilizer Recommendation
fertilizer.subtitle: Enter your soil details to get suitable crops and fertilizer type & quantity
fertilizer.nutrientLevels: Nutrient levels (from experience or soil test)
fertilizer.cropSuggestFirst: — Suggest crops for my soil first —
fertilizer.cropHint: Leave as is to only see suitable crops; select a crop to get fertilizer dose
fertilizer.areaHint: Used to calculate total fertilizer quantity
fertilizer.selectSoilAndPh: Please select soil type and pH.
fertilizer.suitableCropsDesc: Based on soil type and pH. Select one above and submit again for fertilizer details.
fertilizer.acres: acre(s). Adjust splits and timing as per your local practice.
fertilizer.soilAdequate: Your soil nutrient levels are adequate. Focus on balanced maintenance and organic matter. A soil test can confirm.

crop.title: Crop Recommendation
crop.subtitle: Enter soil nutrients and weather data to get AI-powered crop recommendations
crop.recommendationNote: Based on your soil nutrients and weather conditions. For best results, use values from a recent soil test.
